title: Boeing’s Moon Rocket Faces Uncertain Future Under Trump’s NASA
description: NASA’s Boeing Co. rocket just propelled astronauts farther into space than ever before. The Trump administration is already looking to competitors for a replacement.

title: Japan Bets $16 Billion to Propel Rapidus in Global AI Chip Race
description: Japan approved ¥631.5 billion ($4 billion) in additional subsidies to quicken Rapidus Corp.’s entry into the high-stakes AI chipmaking arena, ramping up support for a project widely regarded as a long shot.

title: OpenAI Accuses Musk of ‘Ambush’ as $100 Billion-Plus Trial Looms
description: OpenAI says Elon Musk has suddenly changed direction on what he’s seeking in his lawsuit against the startup in a “legal ambush” just weeks before trial.
